raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I purchased a round-trip ticket from XXXX to XXXX through American Express Travel for {$1500.00}. The ticket was issued as # XXXX. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, the ticket was canceled without warning by XXXX XXXX after a chargeback initiated by American Express. XXXX XXXX informed me that the funds were refunded to my account. However, I never received this refund. 
I filed a complaint with American Express Travel on XX/XX/XXXX ( Dispute XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX ). Despite this, Amex Travel did not engage with XXXX XXXX until XX/XX/XXXX, after the ticket was already canceled. 
I have repeatedly contacted both American Express Travel and American Express Card Services. Each division is refusing responsibility : Amex Cards states they can not process a dispute because the merchant listed on my statement is XXXX XXXX. 
Amex Travel acknowledges the complaint and that I need to be refunded but has delayed and mishandled the process, leaving me with no refund ( waiting for XXXX XXXX ) As a consumer, I am stuck in a dispute between two related entities ( Amex Travel and XXXX XXXX ), while Amex Cards refuses to provide chargeback protections. This leaves me out of pocket for {$1500.00}, plus considerable time and inconvenience. 

Desired Resolution A full refund of {$1500.00} for the canceled ticket. 
Additional compensation for time lost and mishandling ( {$2000.00} ) consistent with my demand letter already sent to American Express Travel. 
Assurance that Amex Travel will not delay or mishandle future complaints.
